IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.
XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version

XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.
XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id

info.description: Workspace-scoped usage, quota, gateway-stream, and observability series exposed through the unified gateway. Generated from the unified public API contract for v1.
info.summary: Workspace-scoped usage, quota, gateway-stream, and observability series exposed through the unified gateway.
info.title: In Atelier Metrics API

400.description: The export request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller lacks permission to export tenant audit records.

409.description: The export request conflicts with current audit export guardrails.

413.description: Gateway rejected an oversized request body.

422.description: The export request is valid JSON but violates governance or masking policy.

429.description: Gateway QoS policy rejected the request rate for this route family.

431.description: Gateway rejected one or more invalid or oversized request headers.

504.description: The upstream audit export preview did not complete before the gateway timeout profile expired.
